Registry / Terms / indicator

indicator

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00586 · 13 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 9 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

9 distinct definitions across 13 publications. 4 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
a device which displays the mass calculated by the processor and other quantities. It may or may not be part of the processor
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency

202X1998OIML R 125:1998T.801622pending
2 identical202X
electronic device of an instrument that may perform the analog-to-digital conversion of the output signal of the load cell, and which further processes the data, and displays the weighing result in units of mass

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102000OIML R 129:20002.501704
a device which displays the dimensions measured and the associated quantities calculated by the processor. It may or may not be associated with the processor
pending

device that displays the measures dimension and any associated quantities

electronic device that may perform the analogue-to-digital conversion of the output signal of the force receptor, and further processes the data, and displays the weighing result in units of mass
